name: Port Scanning & Network Reconnaissance
description: Use Nmap to perform comprehensive port scanning against an isolated target. Discover open services, identify versions, and find a hidden service on a non-standard port. Also includes a simulated DNS server for OSINT/zone-transfer practice.

flags.hint: The target has services on the standard ports (22, 80) BUT also on a non-standard port. Scan ALL 65535 ports: nmap -p- --min-rate=1000 target
Try a DNS zone transfer against the lab's DNS server: dig axfr acme-corp.lab @172.22.0.10

learning_objectives: Perform basic TCP connect and SYN port scans with Nmap
Use Nmap service version detection (-sV) to identify running software
Understand port states: open, closed, filtered
Find hidden services on non-standard ports
Perform a DNS zone transfer to enumerate all subdomains
Read and interpret Nmap XML/text output
